title: Maximum Creativity
description:
This Modpack contains the best mods to overhaul your creative mode experience!

Includes FPS optimization mods like Sodium, and crazy Creative Mode based mods like Axiom!

Includes 33 mods.

All credit goes to the creators of these mods!
body:
# Maximum Creativity

This is Maximum Creativity,
A Minecraft modpack dedicated for building in Creative Mode worlds.

This modpack contains FPS improvement mods and Creative Mode mods like Axiom.

This modpack is lightweight and you can add mods if you wish.

This mod is not to be used for commercial reasons, like selling Minecraft maps or builds due to it including the non-commercial version of Axiom. Buy an Axiom commercial license or disable Axiom if you want to use this modpack commercially. (Profits made from the Axiom commerical license go to the Axiom devs, not me.)

Axiom will not function on multiplayer servers (could work with Essential) as it requires a commercial license for all commercial uses. If you want to with Axiom in multiplayer, non-commercially, join the Axiom Discord and apply for a whitelist.

World Host (lets you connect to a friend's server from anywhere) will most likely not work with Axiom.

Report all issues or bugs to the official Discord server.

You may not reupload this modpack to any other website or within Modrinth without my permission. I (bingusbongus) reserve all rights.
